sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Bank Profile & Competitive Positioning
required_elements: Bank type classification and business line revenue mix
Asset size, deposit base composition, and rate sensitivity
Geographic and customer segment concentration analysis
Competitive tier and GSIB/systemic importance assessment

sections.title: Net Interest Income & Margin Bridge
required_elements: NII and NIM trend analysis with 8-quarter history
Loan portfolio composition and repricing frequency
Deposit composition, beta dynamics, and cost inflation
Funding strategy and wholesale funding cost profile

sections.title: Credit Quality & Loan Loss Dynamics
required_elements: Non-accrual loan (NPL) ratios and charge-off rate trends
Credit cycle positioning and early delinquency monitoring
Commercial real estate exposure and segment risk breakdown
Consumer credit trends and loss severity assumptions

sections.title: Capital Adequacy & Regulatory Framework
required_elements: CET1, Tier 1, and leverage ratio vs. regulatory minimums
CCAR/DFAST stress test history and capital impact
Basel III endgame impact modeling and CET1 hit
GSIB surcharge and dividend/buyback capacity analysis

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Deposit outflow trends and liability management risk
NIM compression velocity and terminal NIM assumptions
Credit stress signals and provision rate benchmarking
Regulatory overhang and M&A/competitive market share impact

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: NIM sustainability under multiple rate scenarios and deposit repricing lag
Capital generation, CCAR resilience, and dividend coverage modeling
Credit cycle positioning and loan loss reserve adequacy assessment
